name: Tokyo Camouflage Hour
original_name: トーキョーカモフラージュアワー
overview: A naive, fair-skinned country boy from Yamagata moves to Tokyo for work and has a one-night stand with an older city woman. As they navigate their feelings, they question whether their connection is real or just a fleeting moment.

trailers.title: 【ロングPR】「トーキョーカモフラージュアワー」主題歌初解禁！
